page.title: Harpocrate vaults
page.subtitle: Configure the vaults used by the backend to resolve external secrets.
page.no_selection: Select a vault on the left to view its details.

list.empty_subtitle: External model api keys (OpenAI, Voyage, Anthropic…) live in a Harpocrate vault. Create your first vault so the backend can resolve secrets used by your workspaces.

secrets.has_more: More results available on the backend (refine the filter).
secrets.loading_error_body: The backend could not list secrets. Check network connectivity and api_key.

info.footer_note: Data is refreshed every time the tab is opened (no backend cache). If the key is revoked on Harpocrate, this page will return an auth error.
info.loading_error_body: The backend could not fetch wallet metadata. Check network connectivity and api_key.

menu.set_default_error_toast: Failed to change the default vault

replace_dialog.title: Replace access key
replace_dialog.explanation: You must have previously created a new api_key in the Harpocrate UI. Paste its token and identifier here. The associated wallet stays the same.

reveal_dialog.title: Reveal the key in clear
reveal_dialog.warning_body: This action is tracked on the backend (event vault.reveal in Loki). The value must never be copied outside a legitimate configuration use.

retire_dialog.title: Retire this vault
retire_dialog.warning_with_wallet: The remote Harpocrate wallet "{{wallet_name}}" will NOT be deleted. Only the local configuration is removed — refs ${vault://{{vault_name}}:…} will no longer resolve until another vault carries this name.
retire_dialog.warning_without_wallet: The remote Harpocrate wallet will NOT be deleted. Only the local configuration is removed — refs ${vault://{{vault_name}}:…} will no longer resolve until another vault carries this name.
retire_dialog.confirm_label: Type the vault name to confirm:
retire_dialog.default_conflict_toast: Set another vault as default before retiring this one.

create_dialog.title: Create a new Harpocrate vault
create_dialog.subtitle: Connect the backend to a Harpocrate server with an existing api_key.
create_dialog.name_taken: This name is already in use.
create_dialog.dek_missing_body: The backend cannot encrypt the new key: the HARPOCRATE_DEK environment variable is not set. Add it to the backend .env (min 32 characters) and restart the stack before creating a vault.
